privileged_info_summary: The task relies on synthetic data generated during setup. For overdue payments (> 30 days): Pavlova has a $1,520 invoice (40 days ago) and a required $200 debit note, netting a $1,320 payment. Specialty Biscuits has a $2,430 invoice (35 days ago). Grandma Kelly's Homestead has a $1,890 invoice (45 days ago). Invoices not overdue (< 30 days) that should not be paid are Pavlova's $875 (12 days ago) and Exotic Liquids' $1,080 (5 days ago). The passing threshold is a score of 65 out of 100.
